heading: Army and Air National Guard of the United States: status
label: 12401 Army and Air National Guard of the United States: status
text: Members of the Army National Guard of the United States and the Air National Guard of the United States are not in active Federal service except when ordered thereto under law.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3495 and 8495 of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(f)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
